title: ritterocereus humilis
intro: Ritterocereus humilis, also known as the "Mexican night-blooming cereus", is a cactus species that belongs to the Cereus genus and is native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against wounds, infections, and fever. The health benefits of Ritterocereus humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, teas, and topical creams, allowing for different applications and benefits.
